description: An underwriter has approved an application for a small business owner's policy (BOP) and needs to issue it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the approved application and final quote.

expected_outcome.value: The underwriter has the final, approved terms for the policy.

nodes.task_description: Bind coverage, making the policy officially active.

expected_outcome.value: The underwriter successfully binds the policy.

nodes.task_description: Generate the complete policy document package and send it to the new policyholder.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates and sends the full policy packet to the customer.
